scanView.title: Find duplicate files and free up space on your computer.
scanView.support: Replica is a desktop app that scans images, videos, PDFs, documents, and more — entirely on your machine.
scanView.readyToScan: Folder selected — you can start the scan

desktop.title: Desktop App
desktop.description: Installed on your Mac or PC. Scanning runs on your computer — no browser tab, no cloud, and no account required.

detection.title: Content-Based Detection
detection.description: Files are hashed on your device. Duplicates are matched by content, not filename, for accurate results.

review.title: You Stay in Control
review.description: Review every duplicate group before removing anything. Selected files are moved to your system Trash.

folderSelector.title: Choose a folder to scan
folderSelector.description: Browse your computer and pick a folder to scan for duplicates.
folderSelector.localNote: All scanning happens locally. Your files are never uploaded or sent over the internet.
